traceProperty.queryString: A[] (not trace.wait_for_action && (trace.clock_resets == ALLOC_ACTION_COUNT || errorless_allocator_count == 0)) imply not allocators_processing
traceProperty.queryComment: Whenever there are no allocators left to process, so either the trace is iterated over entirely, or the allocators are all errored, we never reach allocators_processing.
